ColumnsExplained: x_r = X coordinate on screen, right eye; y_r = Y coordinate on screen, right eye; pup_r = Pupil size (a.u.), right eye, software detected blinks linearly interpolated; event_trigger = event onsets as also described in events.tsv; pup_r_raw = Pupil size, right eye, without interpolation of blinks interpolated_bool = whether this data point has been interpolated
